creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
This is a new port of etcd, software coming from CoreOS that is doing the same job as ZooKeeper does, yet being fresh, fast, lightweight, well documented and quickly developing project written in Go.

Fix: Commit the port to Ports Tree.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Simply cd /usr/ports/devel/etcd and test make install/deinstall/package and so on.
